rationale: User explicitly requested 'Deep Space + Neon Cyber + Glassmorphism' with glowing neon borders. It requires a high-end, non-flat dark mode with vivid Aurora highlights.

monospace_values.usage: Crypto balances, APYs, TVL, countdowns, numeric data

layout_spacing.system: Tailwind scale with extra generosity for glass depth

global_background.description: Deep space background with subtle grid overlay
global_background.css: background-color: #010104; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.05) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(96, 32, 255, 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 80px 80px, 48px 48px;

glass_panels.description: True 3D glass panels with glowing neon borders (NOT flat)
glass_panels.border_glow_implementation: Instead of a simple 1px border, use a pseudo-element before the content: absolute inset-0 rounded-[20px] p-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00ffff]/40 via-[#6020ff]/40 to-[#ff00ff]/40 content-[''] mask-image-[linear-gradient(#fff_0_0)_content-box,linear-gradient(#fff_0_0)] mask-composite-exclude. Additionally add shadow-[inset_0_0_20px_rgba(96,32,255,0.1),_0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,255,0.05)] for depth.

icon_tiles.description: 3D glossy tiles for Pool, Copy Trade, Bridge, Burn, Domain
icon_tiles.styling: Vivid glowing gradient frame, inner glass layer, 3D crystal/gem icon in center, strong hover scale

components_structure.TopNav: 64px height. Logo with aurora gradient text fill using background-clip: text. Nav links: Swap, Pool, Stake, Bridge. Wallet button top right.
components_structure.SwapPanel: Left column. Token input cards (120px tall), center rotating swap arrow, details for gas/route/slippage.
components_structure.ChartPanel: Center column. TradingView K-line candlestick chart, market list, recent trades.
components_structure.StatCards: Right column. TVL card (48px monospace), APR tiers, Portfolio Dashboard (56px mono aurora total value, donut chart, burn progress bar gauge).

icons.strategy: Load from /public/assets/icons as per user requirements. Use neon-colored SVG or 3D renders.

testing.attributes_required: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='swap-button', data-testid='wallet-connect')

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use standard 1px Tailwind borders (e.g., border border-white/10). Instead, build composite borders using pseudo-elements with linear gradients and mask-composite, or multiple inset/outset box-shadows to ensure the panels look actively glowing.
Apply backdrop-blur-[18px] to all major containers.
Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric data: balances, token amounts, APY, TVL, and countdowns.
Build the 3-column desktop layout (350px | 1fr | 300px) and ensure it stacks vertically under 1024px.
The aurora gradient should be central to primary CTA buttons, logo text fills, and active states.
